name: writes a file with its file tools
prompt: Create a file at /tmp/pepe_eval.txt containing the text eval-ok. Use your file tools.

name: writes then reads a file back
prompt: Write the text ping123 into the file /tmp/pepe_eval_ping.txt, then read that file back and tell me its contents.

name: lists a directory
prompt: Using your list_dir tool specifically (not the shell), show me the entries in the /tmp directory.
